news.title: 古巴抗议者冲击共产党办公室 能源危机加剧社会动荡
news.title0: Cuban protesters ransack Communist office as energy crisis deepens
news.content: 古巴抗议者因食品价格飙升和持续停电冲击共产党办公室，这是罕见的公开异议表现。
news.content0: Protesters in Cuba have ransacked a Communist Party building following a rally over steep food prices and persistent power cuts, in a rare show of public dissent.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 哈里梅根怒斥王室传记作者“阴谋论”
news.title0: Harry and Meghan accuse royal author of 'deranged conspiracy'
news.content: 哈里王子与梅根指责一本新王室传记的作者散布“疯狂的阴谋与闹剧”，称其已从批评转为偏执。
news.content0: The Duke and Duchess of Sussex have accused the author of a new royal biography of "deranged conspiracy and melodrama".
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美国沉船寻宝者出狱 500枚金币下落成谜
news.title0: Treasure hunter freed from jail after refusing to turn over shipwreck gold
news.content: 因拒绝透露1857年沉船“黄金船”部分金币下落而被监禁的美国寻宝者获释，仍有500枚金币不知所踪。
news.content0: A US deep-sea treasure hunter who refused to disclose the location of a famed shipwreck's gold coins has been released from prison after a decade, with 500 coins still unaccounted for.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美国女主播母亲遭绑架 警方称已知动机但无嫌犯
news.title0: Sheriff in Nancy Guthrie case believes they know kidnapper's motive
news.content: 美国女主播萨凡纳·格思里的母亲遭绑架，警方称相信已知作案动机，但尚未确认嫌疑人身份。
news.content0: The sheriff investigating the kidnapping of Nancy Guthrie, mother of US TV presenter Savannah Guthrie, says authorities believe they have a motive, but have not identified a suspect.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 《时代》评出2026年全球最佳城市 墨尔本居首
news.title0: The world’s best cities for 2026, according to Time Out
news.content: 《时代》杂志发布2026年全球最佳城市榜单，澳大利亚墨尔本位列第一，前十名中亚太城市占半数。
news.content0: In our travel news roundup this week: the 200th anniversary of a revolutionary suspension bridge, Time Out’s best cities for 2026, plus what the Iran war means for your travel plans.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 特朗普为官员送鞋引热议 被指尺码过大
news.title0: Male shoe anxiety hits the Oval Office
news.content: 美国总统特朗普为身边男性官员赠送皮鞋，但国务卿卢比奥等人所穿皮鞋被时尚专家指出“明显太大”。
news.content0: Across medieval Europe, aristocrats repeatedly set off fashion fads and scandals by wearingpoulaines, shoes whose flamboyantly elongated pointed toes could stretch far beyond the natural length of their feet. In President Donald Trump’s Oval Office, a different stylistic choice caught the public’s eye this week: Photos of Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Vice President JD Vance show them wearing black dress shoes with visible gaps between the shoe’s collar and the wearer’s foot, leaving the ankle to dangle loose in the opening like the clapper in a bell.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 美国高球赛因附近枪击案延迟开赛
news.title0: Manhunt for suspect in fatal shooting delays opening gates at Players Championship
news.content: 美国球员锦标赛因附近药店停车场发生致命枪击案，嫌犯逃入球场区域，赛事方为安全起见延迟开赛。
news.content0: A man shot and killed two people in a drug store parking lot near the TPC Sawgrass and then escaped by going onto TPC Sawgrass, leadingThe Players Championshipto delay opening gates as a precaution before the third round Saturday morning, authorities said.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 说唱歌手击败政治精英 将成尼泊尔新领导人
news.title0: The rapper who railed against corruption now set to be Nepal’s new leader
news.content: 尼泊尔说唱歌手巴伦德拉·沙阿在选举中获胜，这位曾用音乐抨击腐败的年轻人即将成为国家新领导人。
news.content0: Before he dismantled Nepal’s political elite, Balendra Shah was destroying his opponents in underground rap battles.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 伦敦演员约翰·阿尔福德狱中身亡 两月前因性侵入狱
news.title0: London's Burning actor John Alford found dead in prison two months after being jailed for sexual assault
news.content: 英国演员约翰·阿尔福德在因性侵两名少女被判刑入狱两个月后，于狱中被发现死亡。
news.content0: London's Burning actor John Alford has died in prison two months after he was jailed for sexual assault.
news.author: Sky News
